title: SoftBank is creating a robotics company that builds data centers — and already eyeing a $100B IPO
summary: SoftBank is launching a robotics company focused on building AI-powered data center infrastructure, with plans for a potential $100 billion IPO that underscores the intersection of robotics and AI infrastructure investment.
content: You need infrastructure to build AI a and robots, but apparently you also need AI and robots to build infrastructure.

zh.title: SoftBank正在创建一家建造数据中心的机器人公司——并已将目光投向1000亿美元IPO
zh.summary: SoftBank正在推出一家专注于构建AI驱动数据中心基础设施的机器人公司，计划进行可能达到1000亿美元的IPO，突显了机器人和AI基础设施投资的交汇点。

title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
summary: Amazon and Meta are joining regulators to challenge Google Pay and PhonePe's 80% control of India's UPI payment network, lobbying for restrictions on the dominant digital payment platforms.
content: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.

zh.title: 亚马逊和Meta加入对抗Google Pay、PhonePe在印度主导地位的战争
zh.summary: 亚马逊和Meta正在加入监管机构，对Google Pay和PhonePe对印度UPI支付网络80%的控制权提出挑战，游说对主导性数字支付平台施加限制。

title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
summary: AWS revenue is exceeding expectations, but Amazon is committing to significant capital spending in the near term, according to CEO statements. This matters because it shows continued investment in cloud infrastructure growth.
content: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

zh.title: 亚马逊的云业务飙升，资本支出也随之增加
zh.summary: AWS 收入超出预期，但根据首席执行官的声明，亚马逊承诺在短期内大幅增加资本支出。这很重要，因为它表明亚马逊继续投资云基础设施的增长。

title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
summary: Anthropic has received multiple pre-emptive investment offers valuing the AI company between $850-900 billion. This reflects growing investor demand for AI capabilities as Anthropic positions Claude as a major competitor.
content: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

zh.title: 消息人士：Anthropic 可能以 9000 亿美元估值融资新一轮 500 亿美元
zh.summary: Anthropic 收到了多份主动投资提议，将这家人工智能公司估值在 8500 亿至 9000 亿美元之间。这反映了投资者对人工智能能力的需求不断增加，因为 Anthropic 将 Claude 定位为主要竞争对手。

title: Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
summary: During his second day of testimony in his case against OpenAI, Musk struggled with cross-examination, refusing direct answers and contradicting earlier statements, while jury members displayed visible skepticism. The performance undermined his legal position in attempting to dismantle OpenAI.
content:
Just a simple country CEO who was being tricked by that sophisticated lawyer | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

About five hours into Elon Musk's testimony, I typed the following sentence into my notes: "I have never been more sympathetic to Sam Altman in my life."
Musk's direct testimony was an improvement over yesterday - even if his lawyer kept asking leading questions to cue him in how to answer. But that memory was immediately obliterated by an absolutely miserable cross-examination. For hours, Musk refused to answer yes or no questions with yes or no, occasionally "forgot" things he'd testified to in the morning, and scolded defense lawyer William Savitt. I watched a few jury members glance at each other. During one testy exchange, one woman wa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克在法庭上最大的敌人是他自己
zh.summary: 在与 OpenAI 案件的第二天证词中，马斯克在交叉询问中举步维艰，拒绝给出直接答案并与之前的陈述相矛盾，而陪审团成员表现出明显的怀疑。这次表现削弱了他试图瓦解 OpenAI 的法律立场。
